title: Sarah Novosel
compiled_truth: Sarah Novosel is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-10-04 to 2002-02-06), Sarah Novosel sent 160 and received 2466 emails, totalling 2626 interactions. Top correspondents: [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (124), [Linda Robertson](people/linda-robertson) (79), [James Steffes](people/james-steffes) (76), [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (71), [Donna Fulton](people/donna-fulton) (56). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, credit_issues, deleted_items, eol, ferc, gas_issues.
